# Capital Core Dance Studio

> Capital Core Dance Studio is a family-owned dance school in Midlothian, Virginia, offering year-round dance classes, summer camps, birthday parties, and adult movement programs for kids and adults. Located at 13110 Midlothian Turnpike, the studio serves families across Midlothian, Chesterfield County, and the greater Richmond, VA area.

## About

- **Location:** 13110 Midlothian Turnpike, Midlothian, VA 23113
- **Phone:** (804) 234-4014
- **Email:** info@capitalcoredance.com
- **Website:** https://capitalcoredance.com
- **Hours:** Monday–Friday 3:00 PM – 8:00 PM, Saturday 9:00 AM – 2:00 PM
- **Service area:** Midlothian, Chesterfield County, Richmond, and the surrounding Central Virginia region
- **Ages served:** 2 years old through adult

## Programs

### Year-Round Dance Classes (https://capitalcoredance.com/classes)
Weekly classes in ballet, jazz, hip hop, contemporary, tap, acro, tumbling, lyrical, musical theatre, Irish dance, and pom/cheer. Levels from beginner to advanced. Preschool creative movement classes available for ages 2–5. Adult fitness classes also offered. First class is always free for new families.

### Summer Dance Classes (https://capitalcoredance.com/summer-classes)
Six-week summer session, June 23 – July 30, 2026. Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday evenings. Ages 2 through teen. Class options include Tiny Ballet & Tumble, Beginner Ballet & Hip Hop, Tumble Techniques, Beginner Ballet & Tap, Hip Hop, Ballet & Contemporary Technique, Beginner Jazz & Tumble, and a Tik Tok Hip Hop workshop. Per-class enrollment ($120–$180 each), Summer Flex Pass ($329 unlimited), or drop-in ($25/class). $50 deposit reserves the spot.

### Summer Dance Camps (https://capitalcoredance.com/camps)
Eight themed weeks of dance camps for ages 4–13, running June through August 2026. Monday–Friday, 9:30 AM – 3:30 PM. Single days, half-days, and before/aftercare available. Pricing: $205/week for current dancers, $225/week for non-studio campers.

### Adult Summer Series — Move. Connect. Grow. (https://capitalcoredance.com/adult-summer-series)
A 90-minute movement experience for women in Midlothian, VA. Mondays 6:00–7:30 PM, six weeks starting June 29, 2026. Every class includes 45 minutes of Throwback Flow (feel-good choreo to throwback hits), 30 minutes of Femme Flow (graceful, empowering movement), and 15 minutes of Calm Confidence (stretch + breathe). Beginner friendly, no experience needed, supportive and judgment-free. Pricing: $25 drop-in or $120 Summer Series Pass (all 6 classes). Registration is open online with secure payment; spots are limited.

### Mini Series (https://capitalcoredance.com/mini-series)
Six-week spring program (April 6 – May 15, 2026) combining two dance styles per session. $145 per series. A low-commitment way to try a new style.

### Birthday Parties (https://capitalcoredance.com/birthdays)
Private 90-minute dance birthday parties for kids. Packages start at $199 and include up to 10 children, instructor-led party, themed activities, music, and setup/cleanup. $50 non-refundable deposit secures the date.

## Tuition (https://capitalcoredance.com/tuition)

Class pricing scales by length:
- 30-minute classes: $65/month
- 45-minute classes: $85/month
- 60-minute classes: $105/month
- 75-minute classes: $125/month
- 90-minute classes: $150/month

Registration fee: $65 per dancer per semester, or $120 for the full year. Multi-class, sibling, and family discounts available.

Semesters: Fall (August–December) and Spring (January–June).

## Common Questions (https://capitalcoredance.com/faq)

**What dance styles do you teach?** Ballet, jazz, hip hop, contemporary, tap, acro, tumbling, lyrical, musical theatre, Irish, pom/cheer, preschool creative movement, and adult fitness.

**What ages do you teach?** 2 years old through adult.

**Is there a free trial?** Yes — the first class is always free.

**Do you have summer camps?** Yes — 8 themed weeks for ages 4–13, June–August 2026.

**Do you host birthday parties?** Yes — private dance parties starting at $199.

**Where are you located?** 13110 Midlothian Turnpike, Midlothian, VA 23113. We serve Midlothian, Chesterfield County, and the Richmond, VA area.
